Title: Import catalog - categories and items (general)
Preconditions: CSV file with catalog data prepared
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog > Import
2. Upload CSV file with categories and items
3. Start import
4. Verify imported data
Expected Result: Categories and items imported correctly from CSV

Title: Import catalog - creation of new items
Steps:
1. Upload CSV with new product items
2. Start import
3. Verify new items created in catalog
Expected Result: New items created in catalog matching CSV data

Title: Import catalog - subcategories (single and multiple)
Steps:
1. Upload CSV with 1 subcategory level
2. Verify import
3. Upload CSV with multiple subcategory levels
4. Verify import
Expected Result: Subcategory hierarchies imported correctly at all levels

Title: Import catalog - update existing items
Preconditions: Products exist; CSV with updated values prepared
Steps:
1. Upload CSV with updated values for existing items
2. Start import
3. Verify updates applied
Expected Result: Existing items updated with new values from CSV

Title: Import catalog - multiple product images via CSV
Steps:
1. Upload CSV with multiple image URLs per product
2. Start import
3. Verify images attached
Expected Result: Multiple product images imported and attached correctly

Title: Import catalog - multilanguage product descriptions
Steps:
1. Upload CSV with product descriptions in different languages
2. Import
3. Verify all language variants
Expected Result: Product descriptions imported for all specified languages

Title: Import catalog - full product export and reimport
Steps:
1. Export products to CSV
2. Modify some values
3. Reimport modified CSV
4. Verify changes

Title: Import with different column delimiters
Preconditions: CSV files with different delimiters prepared
Steps:
1. Import with Vertical delimiter
2. Import with Comma delimiter
3. Import with Tab delimiter
4. Import with Semicolon delimiter
Expected Result: All delimiter types parsed and imported correctly

Title: Import - user permissions
Steps:
1. Login as user with import permission - attempt import
2. Login as user without import permission - attempt import
Expected Result: Import allowed/denied based on user permissions

Title: Import - SEO properties (creation and update)
Steps:
1. Import CSV with SEO properties for new items
2. Import CSV updating SEO for existing items
Expected Result: SEO properties created and updated via CSV import

Title: Import - common properties (updating and creating)
Steps:
1. Import CSV with common properties for items
2. Verify properties created/updated

Title: Import - multilanguage property values
Steps:
1. Import CSV with multilanguage property values
2. Verify all language values
Expected Result: Multilanguage property values imported for all locales

Title: Export catalog - general
Steps:
1. Navigate to Catalog
2. Select products/categories
3. Click Export
4. Choose CSV format
5. Download
Expected Result: CSV export file generated with correct product data

Title: Export from category and subcategory
Steps:
1. Export from top-level category
2. Export from subcategory
3. Verify CSV contents

Title: Export single physical product
Steps:
1. Select single physical product
2. Export to CSV
Expected Result: Single product exported with all properties

Title: Export digital and BOM products
Steps:
1. Export digital product
2. Export BOM product
3. Verify CSV format
Expected Result: Digital and BOM product types exported correctly

Title: Export with fulfillment center and pricelist selection
Preconditions: Products with FFC and pricelist data
Steps:
1. Select products
2. Choose specific Fulfillment Center and PriceList
3. Export
Expected Result: Export includes selected FFC and pricelist data

Title: Export 10 products bulk
Steps:
1. Select 10 products
2. Export to CSV
3. Verify all products in export
